title: 'Quite an evening': Trump wanted 'the show to go on' after shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
summary_full: Shots were fired near the White House Correspondents' Dinner venue, prompting President Trump's temporary evacuation as a security precaution. The shooter was apprehended by law enforcement, who acted swiftly and bravely. Trump confirmed the incident and indicated plans to reschedule the event, emphasizing the safety of all attendees.
summary_public: Shots were fired near the White House Correspondents' Dinner venue, prompting President Trump's temporary evacuation as a security precaution. The shooter was apprehended by law enforcement, who acted swiftly and bravely…
